title: the reference operator Operator Manifest
description: Schema for the operator manifest served at /.well-known/banza/operator.json (legacy: /.well-known/banza/operator.json)

operator_id.description: Stable identifier for this operator. Must be unique within the federation.

environment.description: The environment this operator is running in.

simulated.description: True if this operator simulates financial operations rather than executing real transactions.

production_allowed.description: SAFETY INVARIANT: Must be false for all sandbox operators. True only for production operators with real money movement enabled.

protocol_version.description: The Banza protocol version this operator implements (e.g. 1.0).

certification_level.description: The highest certification level this operator has achieved (0–4).

capabilities.description: Declared feature capabilities of this operator.

operator_url.description: Base URL of the operator's API.

contact.description: Contact email or URL for the operator team.

then.description: Sandbox operators MUST declare simulated=true and production_allowed=false.

supports_wallets.description: Operator supports wallet creation and management.

supports_qr.description: Operator supports QR code generation and payment.

supports_settlement.description: Operator supports settlement batch creation and execution.

supports_traces.description: Operator exposes GET /traces for financial traceability (Level 2).

supports_webhooks.description: Operator supports webhook delivery with signed envelopes.
